fragment:
<cache-lookup-value key="@("citadel-budget:" + (string)context.Variables["userOid"] + ":" + (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model","*"))"
                        variable-name="cachedBudget" />

    
        
            
        
        
            
            
                @((string)context.Variables["cosmosUserTierUrl"] + "/docs/" + (string)context.Variables["userOid"])
                GET
                
                    @((string)context.Variables["cosmosAuthHeader"])
                
                
                    @("[\"" + (string)context.Variables["userOid"] + "\"]")
                
            
            <set-variable name="resolvedTier" value="@{
                try {
                    var resp = (IResponse)context.Variables["tierResp"];
                    if (resp != null && resp.StatusCode == 200) {
                        return ((JObject)resp.Body.As(preserveContent: true))["tier"]?.ToString() ?? "bronze";
                    }
                } catch {}
                return "bronze"; // fail-safe default to lowest tier
            }" />

            
            
                @((string)context.Variables["cosmosBudgetsUrl"])
                POST
                
                    @((string)context.Variables["cosmosAuthHeader"])
                
                application/query+json
                true
                true
                @{
                    var oid   = (string)context.Variables["userOid"];
                    var model = (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model","*");
                    var tier  = (string)context.Variables["resolvedTier"];
                    // 5 candidate scopes ordered by precedence:
                    var scopes = new JArray(
                        "user:" + oid + ":" + model,
                        "user:" + oid + ":*",
                        "tier:" + tier + ":" + model,
                        "tier:" + tier + ":*",
                        "global:*:*"
                    );
                    return new JObject(
                        new JProperty("query", "SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.scope IN (@s0,@s1,@s2,@s3,@s4)"),
                        new JProperty("parameters", new JArray(
                            new JObject(new JProperty("name","@s0"), new JProperty("value", scopes[0])),
                            new JObject(new JProperty("name","@s1"), new JProperty("value", scopes[1])),
                            new JObject(new JProperty("name","@s2"), new JProperty("value", scopes[2])),
                            new JObject(new JProperty("name","@s3"), new JProperty("value", scopes[3])),
                            new JObject(new JProperty("name","@s4"), new JProperty("value", scopes[4]))
                        ))
                    ).ToString();
                }
            
            <set-variable name="cachedBudget" value="@{
                // Pick the first scope in precedence order that returned a doc.
                var precedence = new[] {
                    "user:" + (string)context.Variables["userOid"] + ":" + (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model","*"),
                    "user:" + (string)context.Variables["userOid"] + ":*",
                    "tier:" + (string)context.Variables["resolvedTier"] + ":" + (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model","*"),
                    "tier:" + (string)context.Variables["resolvedTier"] + ":*",
                    "global:*:*"
                };
                try {
                    var resp = (IResponse)context.Variables["budgetResp"];
                    if (resp == null || resp.StatusCode != 200) return "{\"monthlyTokenLimit\":0,\"adminOverride\":false,\"scope\":\"none\"}";
                    var docs = (JArray)resp.Body.As(preserveContent: true)["Documents"];
                    foreach (var s in precedence) {
                        foreach (JObject d in docs) {
                            if ((string)d["scope"] == s) return d.ToString();
                        }
                    }
                } catch {}
                return "{\"monthlyTokenLimit\":0,\"adminOverride\":false,\"scope\":\"none\"}";
            }" />
            <cache-store-value key="@("citadel-budget:" + (string)context.Variables["userOid"] + ":" + (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model","*"))"
                               value="@((string)context.Variables["cachedBudget"])"
                               duration="30" />
        
    

    
    <set-variable name="usageDocId" value="@((string)context.Variables["userOid"] + ":" + DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("yyyy-MM") + ":" + (string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model","*"))" />
    
        @((string)context.Variables["cosmosUsageUrl"] + "/docs/" + (string)context.Variables["usageDocId"])
        GET
        @((string)context.Variables["cosmosAuthHeader"])
        
            @("[\"" + (string)context.Variables["userOid"] + "\"]")
        
    
    <set-variable name="usedTokens" value="@{
        try {
            var resp = (IResponse)context.Variables["usageResp"];
            if (resp != null && resp.StatusCode == 200) {
                return (int?)resp.Body.As(preserveContent: true)["totalTokens"] ?? 0;
            }
        } catch {}
        return 0;
    }" />

    
    
    
    
    <set-variable name="budgetPct" value="@{
        int limit = (int)context.Variables["limit"];
        int used  = (int)context.Variables["usedTokens"];
        if (limit <= 0) return 0.0;
        return Math.Round((double)used / (double)limit, 4);
    }" />
    

    
        
        
            override
        
        
        
            
                
                @{
                    var now = DateTime.UtcNow;
                    var nextMonth = new DateTime(now.Year, now.Month, 1, 0, 0, 0, DateTimeKind.Utc).AddMonths(1);
                    return ((int)(nextMonth - now).TotalSeconds).ToString();
                }
                1.0
                0
                application/json
                @{
                    return new JObject(
                        new JProperty("type", "error"),
                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                            new JProperty("type", "budget_exceeded"),
                            new JProperty("message", "Monthly token budget exceeded. See Retry-After for reset time.")
                        ))
                    ).ToString();
                }
            
        
        
        
            @(((double)context.Variables["budgetPct"]).ToString("0.0000"))
            @(((int)context.Variables["budgetRemaining"]).ToString())
